plugins.name: slack_notify
plugins.description: Post a one-line session summary to a Slack Incoming Webhook when a session finishes indexing.
plugins.author: community

plugins.name: github_status
plugins.description: Set a GitHub commit status when a session runs against a git repository (token + repo from env vars).
plugins.author: community

plugins.name: ascii_report
plugins.description: Adds GET /api/ascii-report — a compact ASCII table of today's sessions.
plugins.author: community
